title: Add decimals by aligning place values
description: To add decimal numbers, align digits by place value (including trailing zeros if needed) and add corresponding places.
condition: Addition of two or more decimal numbers (e.g., 2.4 + 0.02).
response: Rewrite with aligned place values and add to find the decimal sum.
label: Principle / Model

title: Add fractions with common denominator
description: When fractions share a common denominator, add the numerators and keep the denominator.
condition: Two fractions with the same denominator are added.
response: Add numerators and keep the common denominator.
label: Principle / Model

title: Compare decimal numbers by place value
description: Compare decimals by examining digits from left to right by place value.
condition: Two decimal numbers are given to compare (e.g., 23.513 and 23.531).
response: Determine which is greater by comparing place values.
label: Principle / Model
example: Since $23.513$ has 1 hundredth and $23.531$ has 3 hundredths, $23.513 < 23.531$.

title: Compare fraction expression to benchmark
description: Evaluate or reason about a fraction expression by comparing it to benchmarks like 1/2 or 1.
condition: An expression involving fractions must be classified as less than or greater than 1/2 or 1.
response: Use fraction size reasoning or computation to compare to the benchmark.
label: Principle / Model

title: Convert cubic centimeters to liters
description: Use the relationship between cubic centimeters and liters to convert volume.
condition: Volume given in cubic centimeters must be expressed in liters.
label: Principle / Model

title: Convert mixed number to improper fraction
description: Rewrite a mixed number as an improper fraction before multiplying or adding.
condition: A mixed number appears in a multiplication or addition context.
response: Multiply whole number by denominator, add numerator, and place over denominator.
label: Principle / Model

title: Convert square meters to square centimeters
description: Convert area units by applying squared conversion factors.
condition: Area given in square meters must be expressed in square centimeters.
label: Principle / Model

title: Divide using partial quotients
description: Find a quotient by subtracting convenient multiples of the divisor.
condition: Multi-digit dividend divided by two-digit divisor.
response: Subtract multiples of divisor, sum partial quotients.
label: Principle / Model

title: Divide whole number by unit fraction
description: Dividing by a unit fraction is equivalent to multiplying by its reciprocal.
condition: Expression of the form whole number ÷ (1/n).
response: Multiply the whole number by n.
label: Principle / Model

title: Evaluate expression using order of operations
description: Apply parentheses and operation hierarchy to evaluate multi-step expressions.
condition: An expression with multiple operations and/or parentheses is given.
response: Compute in correct order (parentheses, then multiplication/division, then addition/subtraction).
label: Principle / Model

title: Identify value of power of 10
description: Recognize and evaluate powers of 10 and equivalent expanded forms.
condition: Expression involving $10^n$ or repeated multiplication by 10.
response: Compute value as 1 followed by n zeros.
label: Principle / Model

title: Multiply decimals using place value
description: Multiply decimals by multiplying as whole numbers and adjusting place value.
response: Multiply as whole numbers and place decimal according to total decimal places.
label: Principle / Model

title: Multiply multi-digit whole numbers
description: Use standard algorithm or distributive property to multiply multi-digit numbers.
condition: Product of two multi-digit whole numbers is required.
response: Compute partial products and sum to find total.
label: Principle / Model

title: Multiply or divide by powers of 10
description: Multiplying or dividing by 10, 100, etc., shifts digits according to place value.
response: Shift digits left (multiply) or right (divide) appropriate number of places.
label: Principle / Model

title: Plot ordered pair on coordinate grid
description: Plot a point using given x- and y-values on labeled axes.
condition: Given ordered pair representing quantities (e.g., number of coins and weight).
response: Locate x-value on horizontal axis and y-value on vertical axis; mark point.
label: Production / Skill
example: Plot (5, 23.84) by moving to 5 on x-axis and up to 23.84 on y-axis.

title: Rewrite fraction with equivalent denominator
description: Generate an equivalent fraction by multiplying numerator and denominator by same number.
condition: Need common denominator or comparison for fractions.
response: Multiply numerator and denominator by same factor.
label: Principle / Model

title: Subtract decimals by aligning place values
description: Align decimals by place value and subtract corresponding digits.
response: Rewrite with aligned place values and subtract.
label: Principle / Model

title: Subtract fractions with common denominator
description: When fractions share a denominator, subtract numerators and keep denominator.
condition: Two fractions with same denominator are subtracted.
label: Principle / Model

title: Volume of rectangular prism
description: Find volume by multiplying length, width, and height.
condition: Dimensions of a rectangular prism are given.
label: Principle / Model
